title: Specialist Wanted - HR Company Brisbane QLD Based
excerpt: Hi looking at hiring a specialist to set up our small HR company, most importantly to integrate with outlook to create tasks, rules for outlook and monday.com. Expand our workspace and make it functional and seamless in …

posts.author: Akyra (Kimberly Carter)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi looking at hiring a specialist to set up our small HR company, most importantly to integrate with outlook to create tasks, rules for outlook and monday.com. Expand our workspace and make it functional and seamless in operating.

We have set up company but only the basics and tried to integrate but it keeps adding multiple items.

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Akyra!

Welcome to the community!

You are in the right place to look for a specialist. I specialise in integrating Monday.com for my clients and making sure they get the most out of it! I would love to see how my team and I can help and if we would like to work together.

I offer a complimentary initial 1-hour appointment. I am also located in NSW, so nice and close for time differences!

Look forward to hearing from you!
Elena K
Kick Consulting

posts.author: Akyra (Kimberly Carter)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for responding so soon can I ask what your hourly rate is after the initial consult. I would love to utilise this program to its capabilities and being new to the program would love the extra support to set up and not sure how long we should allow for this process.

posts.author: OliverChrome (Oliver Crombach)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Akyra,
Feel free to reach out to me at oliver@jtscloud.com - we are the APAC Partner of the Year 2020 and help organisations across different verticals with their Monday optimisations. We also develop additional functionality if necessary.

Happy to run through the details with you in a free scoping session.

posts.author: Thomas-Omnitas (Thomas Karlsson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Akyra!

We at Omnitas Consulting are digital management consultants and have built solutions in monday full time for the past 4 years. We are a team of 8, soon to be 12 in Stockholm Sweden fully dedicated to monday. We have been awarded best professional service partner (worldwide) by monday themselves both 2019 and 2020.
We also have a Business Automation Expert working almost exclusively with tools such as Integromat and other low-code integration and automation platforms.

Before starting this company I have worked 11 years with HR in a big governmental organisation, first as a HR-Generalist and Specialist and later on as Personnel Director. I think we are uniquely suited to help you out. We regularly work with clients all over the world, Australia, New Zealand, Europe and USA. We are used to managing the time difference.

We normally start with a free session where we talk about your challenges, needs and desired effect in order to get a good picture and understand both if and how we can help you out. After that session we will be able to give you a complete transparent pricing picture.

Feel free to reach out either through DM or direct email to thomas@omnita.sse

With regards,

posts.author: Andrew1 (Andrew)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Kimberly,
All that you have described is certainly well within my area of expertise and I would be glad to help you out on all this.
You can reach me on andrewjohnson.56782@gmail.com
Cheers and Have a great day ahead,
Andrew
